name: NU-Temperature-Project-ESP-IDF
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git curl && curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs && pip install platformio && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && usermod -aG dialout vscode && chmod a+rw /dev/ttyACM0
